title.text: Regional Patchwork: Naming Diversity by State
title.subtitle: Percentage composition of protected area types across Australia's states

transform.calculate: datum.STATE == 'VIC' ? 'Victoria' : datum.STATE == 'NSW' ? 'New South Wales' : datum.STATE == 'QLD' ? 'Queensland' : datum.STATE == 'SA' ? 'South Australia' : datum.STATE == 'WA' ? 'Western Australia' : datum.STATE == 'TAS' ? 'Tasmania' : datum.STATE == 'NT' ? 'Northern Territory' : datum.STATE == 'ACT' ? 'Australian Capital Territory' : datum.STATE == 'COM' ? 'Commonwealth' : datum.STATE == 'JBT' ? 'Jervis Bay Territory' : datum.STATE

datum.TYPE == 'Nature Reserve' ? 'Nature Reserve' : datum.TYPE == 'Heritage Agreement' ? 'Heritage Agreement' : datum.TYPE == 'National Park' ? 'National Park' : datum.TYPE == 'Natural Features Reserve' ? 'Natural Features Reserve' : datum.TYPE == 'Conservation Park' ? 'Conservation Park' : datum.TYPE == 'Nature Conservation Reserve' ? 'Nature Conservation Reserve' : datum.TYPE == 'Indigenous Protected Area' ? 'Indigenous Protected Area' : datum.TYPE == 'Private Nature Reserve' ? 'Private Nature Reserve' : 'Other Naming Types'
